title: Simple Durability Tooltip
body:
# Simple Durability Tooltip

Lightweight Minecraft mod that displays the durability of items in their tooltip.

- No dependencies required.
- Fully client-side.
- Supports all languages that the game supports.
- Works without enabling advanced tooltips.
- Support modded items.

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/uxog5Mtr/images/ce1aa7e981f5263146b14eeb882ed4ab613f30bc.png)
